evidence.scientific_clarity: Violin+box+jitter overlay with significance brackets clearly communicates distribution differences across all 4 conditions in correct order (Control→low→high→Combo); dashed reference line at viability=1 anchors interpretation.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=none set anywhere in gen_figure.py; PDF uses Type3 (BMQQDV+DejaVuSans) bitmapped outlines and SVG has 0 <text> elements — text is non-selectable paths; default DejaVu Sans used throughout.
evidence.palette: Green (#6ACC65) and red (#D65F5F) are assigned to Drug-A 10µM and Drug-A 50µM respectively — a red-green pair that is indistinguishable under deuteranopia/protanopia; no colorblind-safe palette (e.g. Okabe-Ito) was used.
evidence.layout_density: 6.5×4.5 inch canvas is well-used; violins, boxes, and jittered points fill the panel; significance brackets use vertical space efficiently; spines clipped top/right; no obvious wasted whitespace or label collisions.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes all visual elements and matches the figure; no legend present (colors identified only by x-axis labels, acceptable for a 4-condition strip); no numerical finding (e.g. median viability values) is stated in caption, which a reviewer may flag.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is real vector (paths/beziers for data elements) but font is Type3 — glyphs are outlines, not TrueType/selectable text; fonttype=42 was not set, so text cannot be edited in Illustrator/Inkscape.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (28 KB), figure.png (63 KB), figure.svg (97 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial; all required outputs present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains violin, box, jitter, dashed reference line, and significance brackets with correct statistical test (Mann-Whitney U); condition ordering is stated; alpha value is given; only weakness is absence of a concrete numerical finding (e.g. median Combo viability).

overall_strengths: Complete, well-structured violin+box+jitter figure that faithfully implements the brief: correct condition order, jittered points at α=0.35, significance brackets, and reference line at viability=1.
Caption is thorough and self-contained, describing every visual element with correct statistical terminology and matching the figure exactly.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=none) not set — text is rendered as Type3 outline paths in the PDF and as bezier paths in the SVG, making it non-selectable and non-editable; default DejaVu Sans font used instead of a publication-quality typeface.

Red-green color pair (#6ACC65 / #D65F5F) assigned to the two Drug-A dose conditions is not colorblind-safe and violates the convention of reserving red/green for directional meaning rather than categorical identity.
